disclaimer.description: Footer disclaimer paragraph stating Namefi is an ICANN Accredited Registrar. Keep 'Namefi', 'ICANN', 'DeFi'.

llmsTxt.description: Footer line pointing AI agents to the llms.txt file. The <link> tag wraps 'llms.txt' and must be kept verbatim (it is a markup tag, not text); keep 'llms.txt' and the agent names (Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes, Cursor, OpenCode) untranslated.

copyright.description: Footer copyright line. {year} is the current year (a number); keep the company name 'D3SERVE LABS, Inc.' untranslated.

cookieSettings.description: Footer button label that opens the cookie settings dialog.

cookieSettingsAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the footer cookie settings button.

termsAndConditions.description: Footer link label to the Terms & Conditions page.

sections.explore.title.description: Title of the footer 'Explore' link column.

sections.explore.links.discoverDomains.description: Footer 'Explore' link to the domain discovery/search page.

sections.explore.links.brandStudio.description: Footer 'Explore' link to Namefi Brand Studio. Keep 'Namefi'; translate the descriptor.

sections.explore.links.feed.description: Footer 'Explore' link to Namefi Feed. Keep 'Namefi'; translate the descriptor.

sections.explore.links.outbound.description: Footer 'Explore' link to Namefi Outbound. Keep 'Namefi'; translate the descriptor.

sections.explore.links.domainHunt.description: Footer 'Explore' link to the Domain Hunt feature.

sections.explore.links.newsletter.description: Footer 'Explore' link to the newsletter sign-up.

sections.explore.links.flushDns.description: Footer 'Explore' link to the Flush DNS tool. Keep 'DNS'.

sections.explore.links.faucet.description: Footer 'Explore' link to the NFSC sandbox faucet. Keep 'NFSC'; '(sandbox)' marks the test network.

sections.account.links.myDomains.description: Footer 'Account' link to the user's owned domains.

sections.account.links.myWishlist.description: Footer 'Account' link to the user's wishlisted domains.

sections.account.links.myOrders.description: Footer 'Account' link to the user's order history.

sections.account.links.paymentMethods.description: Footer 'Account' link to the user's saved payment methods.

sections.resources.title.description: Title of the footer 'Resources' link column.

sections.resources.links.careers.description: Footer 'Resources' link to the careers page.

sections.resources.links.tlds.description: Footer 'Resources' link to supported TLDs. Keep 'TLDs'.

sections.resources.links.partners.description: Footer 'Resources' link to the partners page.

sections.resources.links.howWeHire.description: Footer 'Resources' link to the 'How We Hire' page.

sections.resources.links.abuseReporting.description: Footer 'Resources' link to the abuse reporting page.

sections.resources.links.educationHub.description: Footer 'Resources' link to the education hub.

sections.resources.links.registrationAgr.description: Footer 'Resources' link to the registration agreement.

sections.resources.links.apiDocs.description: Footer 'Resources' link to the Namefi API docs. Keep 'Namefi' and 'API'.

sections.resources.links.llmApi.description: Footer 'Resources' link to the API for LLM AI agents. Keep 'API', 'LLM', 'AI'.

sections.resources.links.support.description: Footer 'Resources' link to the support page.

sections.faq.title.description: Title of the footer 'FAQ' link column.

sections.faq.links.aboutNamefi.description: Footer 'FAQ' link to the 'About Namefi' page. Keep 'Namefi'.

sections.faq.links.whatIsDomain.description: Footer 'FAQ' link explaining what a domain is.

sections.faq.links.whyTokenizeDomains.description: Footer 'FAQ' link explaining why to tokenize domains.

sections.faq.links.dnsOnTokenizedDomains.description: Footer 'FAQ' link about DNS on tokenized domains. Keep 'DNS'.

sections.faq.links.dnsIsControlPlane.description: Footer 'FAQ' link explaining that DNS is the control plane. Keep 'DNS'.

sections.faq.links.howToTokenizeCom.description: Footer 'FAQ' link on how to tokenize a .com domain. Keep '.com'.

sections.faq.links.tokenizedVsWeb3.description: Footer 'FAQ' link comparing tokenized domains vs web3 domains. Keep 'Web3'.
